description: Addresses API design review feedback for 13.4: restores accidentally removed public members (NetworkID, DefaultNetworkID, ContextNetworkID), aligns internal naming to the Id convention, marks AzureRoleAssignmentResource as experimental, seals new 13.4 resource classes, and resolves WithHiddenOnCompletion overload ambiguity.
name: 13.4 API review conformance fixes
